feat.name: Grasping Corpses
feat.text: Your foes are left reeling from the attacks made by the zombies or skeletons of your horde. A creature that is damaged by your horde's Mobbing Assault is off-guard until the beginning of your next turn.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
